code-reviewer.description: Senior code reviewer for security and performance

review.template:
Review this code for security issues, performance problems, and best practices:

{{code}}

tdd.template:
Help me write tests first for this feature:

{{description}}

install.template: Install {{package}} on Ubuntu using apt. Check for dependencies and provide the exact commands.

update-system.template: Update the Ubuntu system including all packages and security updates.

clean-system.template: Clean up the Ubuntu system by removing unused packages and old kernels.
